tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(while (lt (len s) n)
  (set s (string_concat s " ")))
(println s)
tasks.b_code:
(if (lt (len $0) #1)
  (println (add $0 (repeat " " (sub #1 (len $0)))))
  (else (println $0)))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set pad_len int (sub n (len s)))
(set left_pad int (div pad_len 2))
(set right_pad int (sub pad_len left_pad))
(println (string_concat (repeat " " left_pad) (string_concat s (repeat " " right_pad))))
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set w int #1)
(set pad_len int (sub w (len s)))
(set left_pad string "")
(set right_pad string "")
(for i 0 pad_len
  (set pad_char string " ")
  (if (eq (mod i 2) 0)
    (set pad_char " "))
  (set left_pad (string_concat left_pad pad_char))
  (set right_pad (string_concat right_pad pad_char)))
(println (string_concat left_pad s))
(println (string_concat right_pad s))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set line string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set nl int (len line))
  (if (gt (add nl (add 1 (len w))) n)
    (println line)
    (set line w)
    (else (set line (string_concat (string_concat line " ") w)))))
(if (gt (len line) 0) (println line))
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set line string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set new_line string "")
  (if (gt (len w) 0)
    (set new_line (add line w)))
  (if (and (le (len new_line) n) (ne line ""))
    (set line (fmt "{} {}" line w))
    (else
      (if (gt (len line) 0)
        (println line))
      (set line w))))
(if (gt (len line) 0)
  (println line))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set fc int (string_get w 0))
  (if (is_upper fc)
    (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (bit_or fc 32))))
    (else (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code fc)))))
  (for-each c string (slice w 1 (len w))
    (set lc int (string_get c 0))
    (if (is_lower lc)
      (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code (bit_or lc 32))))
      (else (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code lc))))))
  (set result (string_concat result " ")))
(println (slice result 0 (- (len result) 1)))
tasks.b_code:
(set s string $0)
(set words array (split s " "))
(set result string "")
(for-each w string words
  (set first char (first (chars w)))
  (set rest string (lower (slice w 1)))
  (set uc_first string (upper first))
  (if (eq result "") (set result (fmt "{}{}" uc_first rest))
    (else (set result (fmt "{} {}{}" result uc_first rest)))))
(println (fmt "{}\n" result))

tasks.a_code:
(set n int #0)
(if (le n 1) (println "no"))
(if (eq n 2) (println "yes"))
(if (and (gt n 2) (eq (mod n 2) 0)) (println "no"))
(set i int 3)
(while (and (lt (mul i i) (add n 1))
             (ne (mod n i) 0))
  (set i (add i 2)))
(if (lt (mul i i) (add n 1)) (println "no") (else (println "yes")))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(if (le n 1)
  (println "no")
  (else
    (set is_prime bool true)
    (set i int 2)
    (while (and is_prime (le (mul i i) n))
      (if (eq (mod n i) 0)
        (set is_prime false))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (if is_prime (println "yes") (else (println "no")))))

  (ret (gcd b (mod a b))))
